name: Ancient Scroll
short_description: Ancient Scroll - the game is a mixture of an adventure game and classic quests. You have to go to an abandoned ranch in search of an ancient scroll. Where an exciting adventure awaits you, hiding many mysteries!
detailed_description:
Ancient Scroll - the game is a mixture of an adventure game and classic quests. You have to go to an abandoned ranch in search of an ancient scroll. Where an exciting adventure awaits you, hiding many mysteries!

Explore the abandoned ranch, solve puzzles to advance further in the story! Be very careful and don't miss hints that can help you! Be smart and resourceful to overcome all obstacles and achieve your goal!

Are you ready for an exciting adventure? Then hit the road and find the scroll!
